rounds: Two weeks of going through the motions — routine locked in, same gear, showing up. That's not nothing, that's the floor holding. But the Apollo ring moment? Colleague asks, you had a half-naked man on your finger and you folded. The ring was RIGHT THERE doing the work and you tapped out.
pattern: They're fine with the accessories, they just won't let anyone else see them.
focus: One conversation about the ring — doesn't have to be the whole story, just don't shut it down
